target.title: Doctor: add lint profiles
target.body:
What Problem This Solves
- Doctor now has warning-level checks that are intentionally excluded from the default `doctor --lint` automation gate because they are deeper or more likely to surface repairable legacy residue.
- Today those checks are only discoverable with exact `--only <check-id>` selectors, which is too hidden for operators who want the complete lint inventory.

Why This Change Was Made
- Adds `openclaw doctor --lint --lint-profile default|full`.
- Keeps `default` as the existing automation-safe selection.
- Lets `full` include default-disabled checks without changing finding severity, finding schemas, repair behavior, or the plugin SDK health contract.
- Leaves `--only <id>` as the precise selector for individual checks.

User Impact
- Existing `doctor --lint` users keep the same broad-lint behavior.
- Operators and maintainers can run `doctor --lint --lint-profile full` to include opt-in/deep checks such as the config audit scrub check added in #84450.
- This is a CLI/docs contract addition only; no config, plugin, or SDK contract expansion.

Evidence
- Stacked after #84450; review after #84450 merges or compare from `doctor-cron-audit-structured-repairs`.
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules\\.bin\\oxfmt.CMD --check src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts docs/cli/doctor.md docs/gateway/doctor.md`
- `node_modules\\.bin\\oxlint.CMD src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.ts src/cli/program/register.maintenance.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:src`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm docs:list`
